%% Procedure to obtain and cook "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact
flowchart TD
    A["Check Event Availability for 'Fine Tea, Full Moon' (-> Genshin Impact event)"] --> B["Participate in the Event Quests"]
    B --> C["Unlock the Recipe for 'Fine Tea, Full Moon'"]
    C -->|"recipe for 'Fine Tea, Full Moon'"| D["Learn the Recipe"]
    D -->|"learned 'Fine Tea, Full Moon' recipe"| E["Gather Ingredients"]
    E -->|"ingredients: Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk"| F["Cook the Dish 'Fine Tea, Full Moon'"]

%% Procedure to reach the Nether in Minecraft by building a Nether Portal
flowchart TD
    A["Step 1: Gather Basic Resources
- Wood
- Crafting table
- Wooden pickaxe"] -->|"wood, crafting table, wooden pickaxe"| B["Step 2: Mine for Stone and Iron
- Gather 17 cobblestone
- Find at least 3 iron ore"]
    B -->|"cobblestone (17), iron ore (≥3)"| C["Step 3: Smelt Iron
- Craft furnace
- Smelt iron ore into ≥3 iron ingots"]
    C -->|"iron ingots (≥3)"| D["Step 4: Collect Water and Lava
- Craft a bucket
- Fill bucket with water
- Locate lava pool"]
    D -->|"bucket (with water), lava pool"| E["Step 5: Create Obsidian
- Pour water on lava source blocks to form obsidian
- Note: diamond pickaxe normally required to mine obsidian"]
    E -->|"obsidian (formed, not mined)"| F["Step 6: Build Nether Portal without Mining Obsidian
- Use mold technique with dirt/blocks
- Place lava with bucket, then water to form obsidian in frame shape
- Complete 10-block portal frame (corners optional)"]
    F -->|"Nether Portal frame (obsidian)"| G["Step 7: Activate the Nether Portal
- Craft flint and steel
  - Flint from gravel
  - Iron ingot (-> remaining from Step 3)
- Light bottom obsidian block to activate portal"]
    G -->|"activated Nether Portal"| I["Entering the Nether
- Stand in the portal to be transported to the Nether"]
    %% Optional branch
    C -->|"iron tools enable deeper mining"| H["Optional: Use a Diamond Pickaxe
- Mine diamonds deep underground
- Craft diamond pickaxe
- Mine obsidian directly for portal"]
    H -->|"mined obsidian blocks"| F

%% Procedure to achieve Sharpness +1 in Monster Hunter Generations (-> Monster Hunter X / MHX)
flowchart TD
    A["Select Armor Sets with Handicraft points (e.g., Nargacuga, Seregios, Silver Sol)"] -->|"Armor pieces with Handicraft points"| B["Mix and Match Armor Pieces to reach Handicraft +10"]
    B -->|"Armor pieces with remaining Handicraft needs"| C["Add Handicraft Decorations (Gems) crafted at the Smithy"]
    C -->|"Total Handicraft points from armor + decorations"| D["Equip Charms (Talismans) with Handicraft points if available"]
    D -->|"Combined Handicraft from armor, decorations, charms"| E["Check Skills on Status Screen for Handicraft +10 → Sharpness +1"]
    E --> F["Hunt Monsters for Materials and Unlock Higher-Rank Quests"]
    F -->|"New materials and unlocked armor sets"| A

%% Procedure to create Lingering Potions of Harming II in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Spider Eye, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Dragon’s Breath, Brewing Stand, Gunpowder (optional)"] -->|"Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Brewing Stand"| B["Brew Awkward Potions"]
    B -->|"Awkward Potions"| C["Brew Potions of Harming I"]
    C -->|"Potions of Harming I"| D["Upgrade to Harming II"]
    D -->|"Potions of Harming II"| E["Make Splash Potions of Harming II (add Gunpowder)"]
    E -->|"Splash Potions of Harming II"| F["Make Lingering Potions of Harming II (add Dragon’s Breath)"]

%% Procedure to obtain the Titanium Sword in Terraria
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat the Wall of Flesh in The Underworld (Hell) to activate Hardmode"] -->|"Pwnhammer (dropped by Wall of Flesh)"| B["Break Demon/Crimson Altars in Hardmode"]
    B -->|"3 or more altars broken → Titanium Ore can spawn"| C["Mine Titanium Ore in the Cavern layer (requires Mythril/Orichalcum Pickaxe or higher)"]
    C -->|"Titanium Ore"| D["Smelt Titanium Bars at an Adamantite or Titanium Forge"]
    D -->|"35 Titanium Bars"| E["Craft the Titanium Sword at a Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil"]
    E -->|"the Titanium Sword"| F["You now have the Titanium Sword"]

%% Procedure to center text across cells in Microsoft Excel without merging
flowchart TD
    A["Open Your Excel Worksheet (-> Microsoft Excel)"] --> B["Select the Cells across which you want to center the text"]
    B -->|"selected range of cells (e.g., A1:B1)"| C["Open the Format Cells Dialog"]
    C --> D["Navigate to the Alignment Tab in the Format Cells dialog"]
    D --> E["Select 'Center Across Selection' in Horizontal alignment and set desired Vertical alignment"]
    E -->|"alignment settings ('Center Across Selection')"| F["Apply the Changes (click OK)"]
    F -->|"centered text in first cell of selection"| G["Verify the Result: text appears centered across selected cells while cells remain separate"]

%% Procedure to become a model in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start With the Right Attributes (Looks 90%+, good Health)"] -->|"High Looks, good Health"| B["Graduate from High School First (age 18+)"]
    B -->|"Age 18+, high Looks maintained"| C["Start as a Foot Model or Junior Model (-> Jobs → Special Careers → Actor/Modeling → Foot Model)"]
    C -->|"Entry-level modeling experience, initial Fame"| D["Maintain and Increase Your Fame"]
    D -->|"Growing Fame, modeling experience"| E["Move Into Regular Modeling (Catalog Model / Runway Model)"]
    E -->|"Famous Model status, unlocked Fame bar"| F["Get an Agent for Elite Gigs (-> Fame menu → hire an agent)"]
    F -->|"Agent, elite gig offers"| G["Attend Auditions (for luxury brands / runway shows)"]
    G -->|"Successful gigs, higher Fame and income"| H["Keep Your Career Stable"]
    H -->|"Sustained high Fame, income, Looks maintained"| I["Max Out Your Fame"]
    I -->|"Full Fame, extra income sources (books, TV, sponsorships)"| J["Retire Gracefully (pivot to other fame-based careers if desired)"]

%% Procedure to enable Secure Boot in BIOS/UEFI to fix Vanguard anti-cheat (-> Valorant) errors
flowchart TD
    A["Restart PC and enter BIOS/UEFI"] --> B["Locate the Secure Boot settings"]
    B --> C["Ensure UEFI mode is enabled"]
    C -->|"UEFI boot mode"| D["Enable Secure Boot"]
    D -->|"Secure Boot (Enabled)"| E["Save and exit BIOS/UEFI"]
    E -->|"BIOS/UEFI changes"| F["Verify Secure Boot is on in Windows (msinfo32)"]
    C -.->|"If Boot Mode is Legacy/CSM and drive is MBR"| G["Convert system drive from MBR to GPT before switching to UEFI"]
    B -.->|"If Secure Boot is grayed out"| H["Set OS Type to Windows UEFI Mode in BIOS/UEFI"]

%% Suggested early-game boss order in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Step 1 – Defeat False Knight
Location: Forgotten Crossroads
Outcome: Early-game combat practice"] --> B["Step 2 – Defeat Gruz Mother
Location: Forgotten Crossroads
Outcome: Access to Sluglings and nearby charms"]
    B --> C["Step 3 – Defeat Vengefly King
Location: Greenpath
Outcome: Route to Zote and minor early-game challenge"]
    C -->|"basic nail, 4–5 masks"| D["Step 4 – Defeat Hornet (Protector)
Location: Greenpath
Outcome: Obtain Mothwing Cloak (dash)"]
    D -->|"Mothwing Cloak (dash)"| E["Step 5 – Defeat Massive Moss Charger
Location: Greenpath (side area)
Outcome: Extra Geo and charge‑dodge practice"]
    E -->|"dash (-> Mothwing Cloak)"| F["Step 6 – Defeat Mantis Lords
Location: Fungal Wastes – Mantis Village
Outcome: Unlock Deepnest entry and pattern‑recognition practice"]

%% Procedure to show/record Nintendo Switch gameplay on a PC using a capture card
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Your Equipment: Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter, USB capture card, USB cable, PC/laptop"] -->|"Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter"| B["Set Up the Switch Dock"]
    B -->|"HDMI cable from dock HDMI OUT"| C["Connect to the Capture Card"]
    C -->|"HDMI cable into HDMI IN on capture card"| D["Connect Capture Card to PC"]
    A -->|"USB capture card, USB cable, PC/laptop"| D
    D -->|"capture card recognized as video device"| E["Install Software"]
    E -->|"capture card as video source in software"| F["Start Playing (view/record/stream Switch gameplay on PC)"]

%% Escaping through the main door in "Granny" on Extreme difficulty
flowchart TD
    A["Understand the Layout of the House and Item Spawn Locations"] --> B["Gather Tools and Items: Padlock Key, Master Key, Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Wire Cutters, Wooden Stake, Red & Blue Cogwheels"]
    B -->|"Wire Cutters"| C["Disable the Security: Use Wire Cutters on Door Alarm Near Main Door; Cut Wires in Basement to Disable Electrical Lock"]
    C -->|"Hammer, Pliers"| D["Remove Barricades: Use Hammer on Wooden Planks at Main Door; Use Pliers to Cut Basement Wires and Disable Electrical Lock"]
    D -->|"Padlock Key"| E["Unlock the Padlock at the Main Door"]
    E -->|"Master Key"| F["Unlock the Main Door After All Security Measures Are Dealt With"]
    F --> G["Distract Granny with Noises While Staying Stealthy"]
    G --> H["Avoid Traps: Bear Traps and Creaking Floors that Alert Granny"]
    H --> I["Final Steps: Exit Through the Main Door Once Unlocked and All Steps Are Complete"]

%% Procedure to use a Gamertag Generator
flowchart TD
    A["Choose a Gamertag Generator Tool"] -->|"chosen gamertag generator tool"| B["Select Your Preferences"]
    B -->|"selected preferences (keywords, style, length, special characters)"| C["Enter Your Information"]
    C -->|"entered information (interests, numbers)"| D["Generate Suggestions"]
    D -->|"generated gamertag suggestions"| E["Review and Pick a Favorite"]
    E -->|"chosen favorite gamertag"| F["Check Availability"]
    F -->|"available or tweaked gamertag"| G["Save or Copy Your Gamertag"]

%% Procedure to disable Quick Chat in Among Us
flowchart TD
    A["Open Among Us"] --> B["Go to the Main Menu (home screen)"]
    B --> C["Open the Settings"]
    C --> D["Select the 'Data' Tab"]
    D --> E["Find the 'Chat Type' Option"]
    E -->|"Chat Type setting"| F["Change Chat Type to 'Free or Quick Chat'"]
    F -->|"Free or Quick Chat selection"| G["Confirm Your Age Setting (account age 13 or older)"]
    G --> H["Save and Exit (close the settings)"]

%% Procedure to play 2-Player Split-Screen Mode in Fortnite
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Your Setup: PS4/PS5 or Xbox One/Series X/S, one TV/monitor, two controllers"] --> B["Start Fortnite (-> Fortnite)"]
    B --> C["Sign In Player 1 (-> Player 1’s Epic Games account)"]
    C -->|"Fortnite Lobby screen"| D["Connect Player 2’s Controller"]
    D -->|"second controller + different account"| E["Join Player 1’s Lobby"]
    E -->|"two characters in the lobby"| F["Select a Game Mode (Duos or Squads)"]
    F --> G["Start the Match"]
    G -->|"split-screen view (horizontal)"| H["Play Together"]

%% Procedure to defeat Sans on the Genocide route in Undertale
flowchart TD
    A["Preparation before the fight: save, stock healing items, equip for ATK, prepare mentally"] --> B["Phase 1: Opening / Early attacks"]
    B -->|"learn initial bone & Gaster Blaster patterns, blue/white rules, Karma behavior"| C["Phase 2: Middle escalation"]
    C -->|"refined muscle memory for mixed patterns and timing for healing items"| D["Final sequence / Last attack"]
    D -->|"survive long bullet-hell, maintain HP, land enough damage"| E["Defeat Sans and trigger post-fight sequence"]
    E --> F["Watch post-fight sequence and proceed to Genocide ending"]
    A --> G["Apply General tips and tricks throughout fight"]
    G -->|"practice segments, use audio cues, minimal movement, smart healing, expect resets"| B
    G --> C
    G --> D
    E --> H["Summary of essentials: stay still during blue, move during white; learn Gaster Blaster & bone timing; heal only in safe windows; memorize patterns; prioritize survival"]

%% Procedure to become President in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a Suitable Character (-> BitLife) in a country with a presidency; high Smarts and Looks"] --> B["Focus on Education: study hard, gain popularity and leadership"]
    B -->|"high grades, popularity, leadership"| C["Get University Education: choose Political Science or similar, keep grades high, do extracurriculars"]
    C -->|"university degree, extracurricular experience"| D["Build a Strong Resume: graduate degree (e.g., Law School) or leadership careers (Lawyer, Business Executive)"]
    D -->|"career income, leadership experience, credentials"| E["Maintain Good Health and Reputation: gym, meditate, doctor; avoid illegal activities"]
    E -->|"good health, clean reputation"| F["Enter Politics: run for local office (School Board Director, Mayor); fund campaign with savings or gigs"]
    F -->|"local office position, campaign experience"| G["Climb the Political Ladder: perform well, raise approval, run for higher offices (Governor, Congress)"]
    G -->|"political experience, high approval, funds, strong reputation"| H["Run for President"]
    H -->|"election result: elected President"| I["Manage your Presidency: keep approval high, avoid scandals and impeachment"]
    H -->|"election result: fail to get elected"| J["Repeat if Necessary: keep building reputation and wealth, run again next election"]
    J -->|"improved reputation and wealth"| H

%% Money-making strategy in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Spring Year 1: Focus on Crops (Parsnips, Potatoes, Strawberries)"] -->|"early profit from crops"| B["Fishing"]
    B -->|"gold from selling fish"| C["Foraging"]
    C -->|"forage items, Mixed Seeds"| D["Mining"]
    D -->|"ores, metal bars"| E["Animal Products (Coop, Barn, Chickens, Cows, Goats, Sheep)"]
    E -->|"steady income from eggs, milk, etc."| F["Summer Year 1: Blueberries"]
    F -->|"profit from Blueberries"| G["Fall Year 1: Cranberries"]
    G -->|"large crop income"| H["Artisan Goods (Mayonnaise, Cheese, Jelly, Wine)"]
    H -->|"high-value processed goods"| I["Winter: Preparation and Foraging"]
    I -->|"upgraded tools, cleared land, extra resources"| J["Invest in Upgrades and Infrastructure"]
    J -->|"better production capacity"| K["Quests and Special Events (-> Stardew Valley festivals, Bulletin Board)"]

%% Procedure to install or repair BattlEye manually
flowchart TD
    A["Ensure Game Compatibility (game uses BattlEye)"] --> B["Locate the BattlEye Folder in the game directory"]
    B -->|"game directory with BattlEye folder"| C["Find the BattlEye Installer (Install_BattlEye.bat / Install_BattlEye.exe)"]
    C -->|"BattlEye installer file"| D["Run the BattlEye Installer"]
    D -->|"installer (-> BattlEye) prompts"| E["Follow On-Screen Instructions"]
    E -->|"installed BattlEye"| F["Verify the Installation by starting the game"]
    F --> G["Update BattlEye (if necessary)"]
    F --> H["Troubleshoot Installation Issues"]
    H -->|"unresolved BattlEye issues"| I["Contact Support (game’s support team or BattlEye support)"]

%% Procedure to become an actor in BitLife without God Mode
flowchart TD
    A["Start a new life with high Looks stat (>80%)"] -->|"high Looks stat"| B["Focus on your appearance as you age"]
    B -->|"maintained/improved Looks"| C["Participate in school activities (e.g., Drama Club)"]
    C --> D["Graduate High School"]
    D -->|"high school diploma"| E["Apply for a job as a Voiceover Actor"]
    E -->|"job as a Voiceover Actor (entry-level acting job)"| F["Work hard every year and get promoted"]
    F -->|"promotions to Actor, Lead Actor, Star"| H["Strive for lead roles and fame"]
    B -->|"good Looks and Health foundation"| G["Maintain your Looks and Health throughout career"]
    F -->|"ongoing career progression"| G
    G -->|"high Looks and Health stats"| H
    H -->|"fame and lead roles"| I["Boost career with commercials, books, social media"]

%% Ways to connect a Wii to a Smart TV
flowchart TD
    A["Start: Decide connection method based on TV inputs and available cables"] --> B["AV (Composite) Connection"]
    A --> C["Component Cable Connection"]
    A --> D["HDMI Connection"]
    A --> E["SCART Connection"]
    A --> F["S-Video Connection"]

    %% AV (Composite)
    B --> B1["Identify the AV Cable (Wii composite AV cable: yellow video, red/white audio)"]
    B1 --> |"Wii composite AV cable"| B2["Locate AV Inputs on the TV"]
    B2 --> |"AV inputs on the TV"| B3["Connect the Cables (yellow to video, red/white to audio)"]
    B3 --> B4["Select the AV Input on the TV"]
    B4 --> |"TV on AV input"| B5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% Component
    C --> C1["Obtain a Wii Component Cable"]
    C1 --> |"Wii Component Cable"| C2["Locate Component Inputs on the TV"]
    C2 --> |"Component inputs on the TV"| C3["Connect the Cables (red/blue/green video, red/white audio)"]
    C3 --> C4["Select the Component Input on the TV"]
    C4 --> |"TV on Component input"| C5["Power On the Wii and adjust Wii settings for component output if needed"]

    %% HDMI
    D --> D1["Purchase a Wii to HDMI Adapter"]
    D1 --> |"Wii to HDMI Adapter"| D2["Connect the Adapter to the Wii"]
    D2 --> |"Adapter on Wii"| D3["Connect an HDMI Cable (Wii adapter -> TV HDMI port)"]
    D3 --> D4["Select the HDMI Input on the TV"]
    D4 --> |"TV on HDMI input"| D5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% SCART
    E --> E1["Get a Wii SCART Adapter"]
    E1 --> |"Wii SCART Adapter"| E2["Plug the AV Cables into the Adapter (Wii AV cables -> SCART adapter)"]
    E2 --> |"SCART adapter with Wii AV cables"| E3["Connect the Adapter to the TV (SCART input)"]
    E3 --> E4["Select the SCART Input on the TV"]
    E4 --> |"TV on SCART input"| E5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% S-Video
    F --> F1["Acquire a Wii S-Video Cable"]
    F1 --> |"Wii S-Video Cable"| F2["Locate S-Video and Audio Inputs and connect (S-Video + red/white audio)"]
    F2 --> F3["Select the S-Video Input on the TV"]
    F3 --> |"TV on S-Video input"| F4["Power On the Wii"]

%% Procedure to play the Sara Sarita game
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: two coins of the same denomination"] -->|"two coins of the same denomination"| B["Choose a Partner (two players)"]
    B --> C["Sit Opposite Each Other"]
    C --> D["Hold the Coins (each player holds one coin)"]
    D --> E["Ask for Permission: “Sara Sarita, may we join your game?” (-> Sara Sarita)"]
    E --> F["Toss the Coins"]
    F --> G["Interpret the Results: Yes / No / Maybe"]
    G -->|'"Yes" (permission to join)'| H["Proceed with Questions to Sara Sarita"]
    H --> I["Toss the Coins after Each Question"]
    I --> J["Interpret the Results: Yes / No / Maybe to each question"]
    J --> K["Conclude the Game: ask “Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?” (-> Sara Sarita) and toss the coins"]
    K --> L["Interpret the Results: Yes / No / Maybe for leaving"]
    L -->|'"No" or "Maybe" (no permission to leave)'| K
    L -->|'"Yes" (permission to leave)'| M["Ending the Game: exit the game"]

%% Procedure to create a powerful deck in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Card Types: Win Conditions, Support Troops, Defensive Cards, Spells, Cycle Cards, Tanks"] -->|"knowledge of card roles"| B["Choose Your Win Condition"]
    B -->|"chosen win condition"| C["Add Support and Defensive Cards"]
    C -->|"partially built deck with support & defense"| D["Include Spells"]
    D -->|"initial full deck list"| E["Balance Your Elixir Cost"]
    E -->|"balanced deck (average elixir 3.0–4.0)"| F["Test and Adjust"]
    F -->|"refined deck after adjustments"| G["Adapt to the Meta"]
    G -->|"meta-adapted deck"| H["Practice and Master Your Deck"]

%% Troubleshooting a flashing blue PlayStation 5 DualSense controller
flowchart TD
    A["Controller flashing blue (-> DualSense controller)"] --> B["Step 1: Check the Controller's Battery"]
    B -->|"charged DualSense controller"| C["Step 2: Restart the PlayStation 5 Console"]
    C -->|"restarted PlayStation 5 console (-> PS5)"| D["Step 3: Reset the Controller"]
    D -->|"reset DualSense controller connected via USB-C cable"| E["Step 4: Check for Firmware Updates"]
    E -->|"updated system software and controller firmware"| F["Step 5: Try a Different USB-C Cable"]
    F -->|"working USB-C cable"| G["Step 6: Try Connecting to Another Device"]
    G -->|"test result (controller vs. console issue)"| H["Step 7: Contact Support (-> PlayStation Support)"]

%% Completing the Community Center in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Unlock the Community Center (-> Community Center, Mayor Lewis, Wizard)"] -->|"access to Community Center & Junimo language"| B["Complete Crafts Room Bundles"]
    A -->|"access to Community Center & Junimo language"| C["Complete Pantry Bundles"]
    A -->|"access to Community Center & Junimo language"| D["Complete Fish Tank Bundles"]
    A -->|"access to Community Center & Junimo language"| E["Complete Boiler Room Bundles"]
    A -->|"access to Community Center & Junimo language"| F["Complete Bulletin Board Bundles"]
    A -->|"access to Community Center & Junimo language"| G["Complete Vault (Gold Payments)"]

    B -->|"all Crafts Room bundles complete"| H["All Rooms' Bundles Complete"]
    C -->|"all Pantry bundles complete"| H
    D -->|"all Fish Tank bundles complete"| H
    E -->|"all Boiler Room bundles complete"| H
    F -->|"all Bulletin Board bundles complete"| H
    G -->|"all Vault payments complete"| H

    H -->|"all bundles & rooms restored"| I["Community Center Restored by Junimos (-> Community Center, Junimos)"]
    I -->|"restored Community Center (-> Community Center)"| J["Pelican Town Celebration Cutscene (-> Pelican Town)"]
    I -->|"choosing Community Center route prevents it"| K["Prevent JojaMart Warehouse Development (-> JojaMart Warehouse)"]

%% Basic strategies and tactics for Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Your Deck (-> Clash Royale deck)"] --> B["Manage Elixir Efficiently"]
    B --> C["Build a Balanced Deck"]
    C --> D["Choose Starting Moves"]
    D --> E["Execute Push and Counter-Push"]
    E --> F["Refine Placement and Timing"]
    F --> G["Apply Defensive Strategies"]
    F --> H["Apply Offensive Strategies"]
    G --> I["Watch Your Opponent’s Moves"]
    H --> I
    I --> J["Adjust Your Strategy"]
    J --> K["Plan Endgame Strategy"]
    K --> L["Practice and Learn from Matches"]

%% How to play Codenames
flowchart TD
    A["Form Teams: two teams with a Spymaster and Field Operatives"] --> B["Prepare the Game Board: place 25 codename cards (5x5 layout)"]
    B --> C["Select a Key Card: shows team agents, neutrals, and assassin"]
    C --> |"the key card"| D["Determine Starting Team: identify which team starts and has an extra agent"]
    
    D --> E["Spymaster (of starting team) Gives Clues: one-word clue + number"]
    E --> F["Field Operatives (of current team) Guess: choose codenames one at a time"]
    F --> G["Reveal Codenames: cover with team color, neutral, opposing color, or assassin"]
    
    G --> H["Check for Assassin or All Agents Found"]
    H -->| "assassin guessed"| I["End of Game: guessing team loses immediately"]
    H -->| "all agents of a team identified"| J["End of Game: that team wins"]
    
    H -->| "no assassin guessed and not all agents found"| K["Ending a Turn: apply turn-end conditions"]
    K --> L["Switch Turns: other team becomes current team"]
    L --> |"turn passes to other team"| E

    %% Tips and rules (not in main flow)
    M["Apply Clue Rules: clue must relate to board words, no form of the word itself, one-word rule"]
    N["Field Operatives may make one extra guess beyond the number given by the Spymaster"]

%% Procedure to escape prison in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Enter Prison (-> BitLife)"] --> B["Access the Escape Mini-Game"]
    B --> C["Understand the Grid Layout and Objective"]
    C --> D["Plan Your Moves"]
    D -->|"knowledge that the guard moves twice and prioritizes horizontal movement"| E["Avoid Detection"]
    E --> F["Navigate the Maze"]
    F -->|"walls and guard position"| G["Calculate Moves"]
    G -->|"predicted guard path"| H["Strategically Use Walls"]
    H -->|"guard led away from you"| I["Gradually Move to Exit"]
    I -->|"clear path to exit door"| J["Execute the Escape"]
    J --> K["Life After Escape"]

    %% Tips (supporting, not strictly sequential)
    subgraph Tips_for_Success
        L["Be Patient and Observe Guard’s Pattern"]
        M["Practice to Improve Prediction"]
        N["Use Trial and Error (accept getting caught and retry)"]
        O["Use the Undo Feature (if available)"]
    end

    D -. "patience and observation" .-> L
    G -. "prediction skill" .-> M
    J -. "if caught, restart grid" .-> N
    G -. "correct last mistake" .-> O

%% Procedure for playing "There Is No Game"
flowchart TD
    A["Start the Game (-> There Is No Game) and click around"] --> B["Interact with Title Screen letters"]
    
    B --> C["Drop the 'O' in 'NO' by clicking it repeatedly"]
    C -->|"fallen 'O'"| D["Use the fallen 'O' to break other letters"]
    
    D --> E["Reveal and open secret compartment to find the trophy"]
    E -->|"trophy"| F["Use the trophy to anger the narrator further"]
    
    F --> G["Fix the Narrator's Problem: break the block with the trophy"]
    G -->|"broken block"| H["Enter new scene with goat and locked cage"]
    
    H --> I["Get the Key from squirrel by obtaining a nut"]
    I --> J["Create a Nut: use the trophy to knock down the tree"]
    J -->|"nut"| K["Open the Nut by dragging it to a stone or hard surface"]
    
    K -->|"cracked nut"| L["Give the Nut to the squirrel"]
    L -->|"key from squirrel"| M["Unlock the Cage to free the goat"]
    
    M --> N["Watch the Ending: humorous events unfold"]
    N --> O["Final Messages from the narrator"]
    O --> P["End of Game: completion of 'There Is No Game'"]

%% Set a PS5 as Console Sharing and Offline Play (primary) and use shared games
flowchart TD
    A["Sign in to the PSN owner account on the target PS5"] --> B["(Optional) Update PS5 system software if needed"]
    B --> C["Open Settings from the PS5 home screen"]
    C --> D["Select Users and Accounts"]
    D --> E["Select Other"]
    E --> F["Select Console Sharing and Offline Play"]
    F --> G["Choose Enable to set this PS5 for Console Sharing and Offline Play"]
    G -->|"this PS5 with Console Sharing enabled"| H["Other users on that PS5 download the owner’s games"]
    H -->|"downloaded games"| I["Other users play the games even if the console is offline (Offline Play)"]

%% Procedure to rob a train in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Meet Age Requirement (18+ in BitLife)"] -->|"character (18+)"| B["Navigate to the Crime Menu"]
    B --> C["Select Train Robbery"]
    C -->|"Train Robbery option"| D["Plan the Robbery (improve Smarts, Craziness)"]
    D -->|"planned character stats (Smarts, Craziness)"| E["Choose Your Timing and Approach"]
    E -->|"chosen timing and approach"| F["Execute the Heist"]
    F -->|"successful robbery loot"| G["Deal with the Consequences (success: enjoy loot)"]
    F -->|"failed robbery outcome"| H["Deal with the Consequences (failure: prison)"]

    H -->|"experience from the robbery and prison time"| I

%% How to obtain Pale Ore and upgrade the Nail in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Start in Hollow Knight"] --> B["Obtain Pale Ore from Ancient Basin (Reward for Beating a Boss)"]
    B -->|"Pale Ore (Ancient Basin, reward for defeating the Broken Vessel boss)"| N["Upgrade Nail at Nailsmith (City of Tears)"]

    subgraph AB["Ancient Basin Pale Ore (Broken Vessel)"]
        B1["Reach Ancient Basin (below City of Tears)"] --> B2["Navigate to left side to find Broken Vessel boss arena"]
        B2 --> B3["Defeat the Broken Vessel boss"]
        B3 -->|"Pale Ore (Ancient Basin)"| B
    end

    A --> C["Obtain Pale Ore from Deepnest (Secret Area)"]
    C -->|"Pale Ore (Deepnest, secret chamber)"| N

    subgraph DN["Deepnest Pale Ore"]
        C1["Head to Deepnest (from Fungal Wastes or Mantis Village)"] --> C2["Go to bottom-right of Deepnest near the Beast’s Den"]
        C2 --> C3["Find hidden path to small chamber containing Pale Ore"]
        C3 -->|"Pale Ore (Deepnest)"| C
    end

    A --> D["Obtain Pale Ore from Hallownest’s Crown (Crystal Peak)"]
    D -->|"Pale Ore (Hallownest’s Crown, Crystal Peak)"| N

    subgraph HC["Hallownest’s Crown Pale Ore (Crystal Peak)"]
        D1["Climb through Crystal Peak (requires Crystal Heart ability)"] --> D2["Reach top area: Hallownest’s Crown"]
        D2 --> D3["Complete tricky platforming to reach Pale Ore"]
        D3 -->|"Pale Ore (Hallownest’s Crown)"| D
    end

    A --> E["Obtain Pale Ore from Grubfather’s Reward (Forgotten Crossroads)"]
    E -->|"Pale Ore (Grubfather’s reward)"| N

    subgraph GF["Grubfather’s Pale Ore (Forgotten Crossroads)"]
        E1["Rescue 31 grubs scattered across Hallownest"] --> E2["Return to the Grubfather in northwest Forgotten Crossroads"]
        E2 --> E3["Receive Pale Ore as reward for freeing 31 grubs"]
        E3 -->|"Pale Ore (Grubfather)"| E
    end

    A --> F["Obtain Pale Ore from Kingdom’s Edge (Reward for Beating a Boss)"]
    F -->|"Pale Ore (Kingdom’s Edge, reward for defeating Nailmaster Oro boss)"| N

    subgraph KE["Kingdom’s Edge Pale Ore (Nailmaster Oro)"]
        F1["Reach Kingdom’s Edge (from City of Tears or Tram)"] --> F2["Go to Colosseum of Fools and head left to Nailmaster Oro’s hut"]
        F2 --> F3["Defeat the boss, Nailmaster Oro"]
        F3 -->|"Pale Ore (Kingdom’s Edge)"| F
    end

    A --> G["Obtain Pale Ore from Seer’s Reward (Resting Grounds)"]
    G -->|"Pale Ore (Seer’s reward)"| N

    subgraph SR["Seer’s Pale Ore (Resting Grounds)"]
        G1["Collect 300 Essence using the Dream Nail"] --> G2["Visit the Seer in the Resting Grounds (after 300 Essence)"]
        G2 --> G3["Receive Pale Ore as reward from the Seer"]
        G3 -->|"Pale Ore (Seer, Resting Grounds)"| G
    end

    N["Upgrade Nail at Nailsmith (City of Tears)"] --> N1["Ensure you have required Geo and Pale Ore"]
    N1 --> N2["Visit the Nailsmith in the City of Tears"]
    N2 --> N3["Pay Geo + give Pale Ore to upgrade your Nail (-> increased attack power)"]

%% How to obtain Demon Keys and Colored Keys in Geometry Dash

        H -->|"Vault of Secrets unlocked"| I["Go to Basement from Vault of Secrets"]

    D --> R["Regularly Open Chests and Claim Rewards in Treasure Room"]
